findings.line: No circle room. No clean floor. No quiet. Only sacks, dust, rough planks, and the buried thread Kel'Thuzad had spent so long teaching dead flesh to answer.
findings.deletionTest: Only sacks, dust, rough planks, and the buried thread Kel'Thuzad had spent so long teaching dead flesh to answer.
findings.reason: Pattern 2 fragment pivot; the three negated setup fragments are removable scaffolding before the usable inventory.
findings.suggestedFix: Only sacks, dust, rough planks, and the buried thread Kel'Thuzad had spent so long teaching dead flesh to answer.

audits.secondSweep: Completed the dedicated pass-A P5/P6 re-read over every sentence. No additional KILLs emerged beyond the main pass; the remaining apparent agency cases were defended as literal plague-mechanism behavior.

findings.line: None of it told her as much as the wind when it shifted.
findings.subject: None of it
findings.realAgent: the new smell and airflow evidence reaching Jaina when the wind shifted
findings.reason: Pattern 2 evidence-personification; the sentence launders Jaina's inference onto an abstract bundle of prior observations instead of the concrete sensory change.
findings.suggestedFix: The shift in the wind mattered more than the map in her head.

findings.line: The corner of Sylvanas's mouth moved once.
findings.subject: The corner of Sylvanas's mouth
findings.realAgent: Sylvanas making a brief physical reaction
findings.reason: Pattern 8 body-part agency; the reaction belongs to Sylvanas, not to an independently acting mouth-corner.

audits.cleanReason: No recurring-tic cap was exceeded on this pass. Counted 1 corner-of-mouth beat (cap 1), 1 literal time-marking use of 'marked' (cap 2), 1 'tightened' beat (cap 3), 2 eye/scan beats within character-specific tactical observation (cap 4), and 1 performance dialogue tag ('muttered', cap 3).

summary.verdictReason: Pass A found only 3 mild kills and no moderate or severe kills, so the chapter clears the pass-with-warnings threshold.
